background: Tell me about yourself and the type of work you have focused on recently.
What kind of problems do you most enjoy working on, and why?
behavioural: Describe a challenging situation at work and how you handled it.
Tell me about a time you had to make progress despite incomplete information.
technical_skills: What skill has been most important in your recent work, and how have you improved it?
Walk me through a technical decision you made recently and what tradeoffs you considered.
problem_solving: Describe how you approach a problem when the root cause is not obvious.
Tell me about a time you had to debug a difficult issue under time pressure.
culture_fit: What kind of team environment helps you do your best work?
How do you build trust when joining a new team or project?
wrapup: What is one area you are actively trying to improve in your work right now?
What would you want your next manager or team to understand about how you work best?

background: Tell me about your background in backend systems and the services you have worked on recently.
behavioural: Describe a time you had to coordinate a backend change across teams with competing priorities.
technical_skills: How do you design a backend service to stay reliable under high concurrent traffic?
What tradeoffs do you consider when choosing a database consistency model for a critical workflow?
problem_solving: You notice a sudden increase in API latency after a deployment. How would you isolate the cause?
How would you redesign a backend workflow that is failing intermittently under load?
culture_fit: How do you handle disagreement during architecture discussions while keeping delivery moving?
wrapup: What kind of engineering culture helps you produce your best backend work?

background: Tell me about the frontend products or interfaces you have been working on recently.
behavioural: Describe a time you had to balance product pressure with frontend quality or accessibility.
technical_skills: How do you structure state management in a complex frontend application without overcomplicating it?
problem_solving: A production UI becomes slow after a new release. How would you investigate the regression?
culture_fit: How do you collaborate with design and backend teams when requirements are still evolving?
wrapup: What kind of feedback loop helps you improve fastest as a frontend engineer?

background: Tell me about the kinds of data systems or analytical workflows you have worked on recently.
behavioural: Describe a time you had to challenge a decision because the underlying data was unreliable.
technical_skills: How do you design a data pipeline to handle delayed or malformed events safely?
problem_solving: A key metric drops unexpectedly after a pipeline change. How would you determine what happened?
culture_fit: How do you work with non-technical stakeholders when data findings are ambiguous?
wrapup: What kind of team environment helps you do your best work with data systems?
